description: Rate- and state-dependent friction joint model (laboratory rate-state friction law), available via 'block contact jmodel assign ratestate'.

property_groups.name: Properties
property_groups.description: Joint properties for the 'ratestate' joint constitutive model. Assign the model with 'block contact jmodel assign ratestate [range ...]', then set these with 'block contact property <keyword> <value> [range jmodel ratestate]'.

note: Detailed property documentation is not present in the local 9.0 manual; only the universal joint stiffness terms are listed. Use 'block contact property' against the running engine for the full rate-state parameter set.
usage: block contact jmodel assign ratestate ; block contact property <prop> <value> [range jmodel ratestate]
